summary: Tested Word Parser Enhancement (SECTION/LESSON/TOPIC hierarchy detection) for Prashnakosh V1. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). All 12 frontend tests pass (100%). Parser correctly detects hierarchy markers, handles context switching, supports Unicode (Sanskrit), generates validation warnings, and includes hierarchySummary in preview response.
critical_code_review_comments: Parser correctly implements SECTION/LESSON/TOPIC detection with Unicode support
Context switching works correctly - new SECTION resets lesson and topic, new LESSON resets topic
Validation warnings generated for questions without proper context markers
Passage support implemented - parser doesn't crash on passage content
hierarchySummary array correctly aggregates questions by section/lesson/topic
Per-question section/lesson/topic fields included in preview response
Department context auto-populates subject/grade in frontend upload form
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data. Test documents created programmatically using python-docx library.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Word Parser Enhancement feature is fully functional. The parser correctly detects SECTION A/B/C, LESSON: <name>, TOPIC: <name> markers from Word documents. Context switching works correctly (new LESSON resets topic, new SECTION resets both). Validation warnings are generated for questions without proper context. Passage support is implemented (parser doesn't crash). Sanskrit/Unicode support verified. Preview screen shows hierarchy summary (Document Structure card) with Section -> Lesson -> Topic -> count. Department context auto-populates subject/grade in the upload form.

backend_tests: Test 1: Science template parsing - 8 questions with correct section/lesson/topic - PASSED
Test 2: Context switching - Q5-Q6 under Motion, Q7-Q8 under Section B - PASSED
Test 3: English template with passage - 5+ questions parsed, no crash - PASSED
Test 4: Sanskrit Unicode support - रामायणम् and व्याकरणम् detected as LESSON names - PASSED
Test 5: Validation warnings for questions without context - PASSED
Test 6: hierarchySummary array in preview response - PASSED
Test 8: Confirm endpoint saves questions with departmentId - PASSED
Test 9: Preview endpoint requires authentication - PASSED
Test 10: Confirm endpoint requires authentication - PASSED

Test 3: Department context 'IX Science' visible in header - PASSED
Test 4: Word upload page loads at /teacher/upload/word - PASSED
Test 5: Format guide shows SECTION/LESSON/TOPIC example - PASSED
Test 6: Subject auto-populated from department context (Science, disabled) - PASSED
Test 7: Grade auto-populated from department context (Class IX, disabled) - PASSED
Test 8: File upload and preview button work - PASSED
Test 9: Document Structure card shows hierarchy (Section A/B -> Lesson -> Topic -> count) - PASSED
Test 10: Section badges visible (blue 'Sec A') - PASSED
Test 11: Lesson badges visible (green 'Life Processes') - PASSED
